metadata.description: Complete input schema for the ADA Decision Engine unified assessment endpoint. Covers all four module input sets plus wrapper-level inputs. All categorical values reference ada_vocabulary.json. Fields marked required:true must be present in a valid request; required:false fields are optional but may affect determination quality.
metadata.legal_domain: Americans with Disabilities Act — Title I (Employment)

description: Complete input schema for the ADA Decision Engine unified assessment endpoint.

accommodation_theoretically_effective.name: accommodation_theoretically_effective
accommodation_theoretically_effective.description: Wrapper-level input. Whether the requested or identified accommodation would be theoretically effective in enabling the individual to perform essential functions. Not produced by any module. Required for WR-2 resolution. If unknown at time of submission, use 'indeterminate'.

module_1_coverage_eligibility.description: Inputs for Module 1: Coverage and Eligibility. Covers employer coverage, individual employment status, disability determination, and qualified individual assessment.

employer_type.name: employer_type
employer_type.description: The type of covered entity. Determines whether the employer threshold and coverage rules under 29 CFR § 1630.2(b) apply.

total_employees.name: total_employees
total_employees.description: Total number of employees across all locations for the current or preceding calendar year, whichever is greater. Must reach 15 for coverage threshold under 42 U.S.C. § 12111(5).

weeks_with_15_employees.name: weeks_with_15_employees
weeks_with_15_employees.description: Number of weeks in the current or preceding calendar year during which the employer had 15 or more employees. Coverage requires 20 or more such weeks per 42 U.S.C. § 12111(5)(A).

individual_status.name: individual_status
individual_status.description: The employment relationship status of the individual asserting ADA rights.

disability_basis.name: disability_basis
disability_basis.description: The statutory prong under which disability status is asserted. Only actual_disability and record_of_disability entitle the individual to reasonable accommodation.

impairment_type.name: impairment_type
impairment_type.description: Category of the underlying physical or mental impairment.

impairment_description.name: impairment_description
impairment_description.description: Freeform description of the diagnosed or perceived impairment. Supplements impairment_type for reasoning output.

major_life_activities_affected.name: major_life_activities_affected
major_life_activities_affected.description: List of major life activities or major bodily functions substantially limited by the impairment, per 29 CFR § 1630.2(i).

substantially_limits.name: substantially_limits
substantially_limits.description: Whether the impairment substantially limits one or more major life activities. Construed broadly per ADA Amendments Act of 2008 and 29 CFR § 1630.2(j).

condition_is_episodic_or_remission.name: condition_is_episodic_or_remission
condition_is_episodic_or_remission.description: True if the impairment is episodic or in remission. Such conditions are evaluated in their active state per 29 CFR § 1630.2(j)(1)(vii).

condition_duration.name: condition_duration
condition_duration.description: Expected or actual duration of the impairment. Relevant to regarded-as prong exclusion for transitory and minor conditions under 29 CFR § 1630.2(l).

essential_functions_identified.name: essential_functions_identified
essential_functions_identified.description: True if the essential functions of the position have been identified, documented, or otherwise established. Essential functions are the fundamental job duties per 29 CFR § 1630.2(n).

can_perform_essential_functions_without_.name: can_perform_essential_functions_without_accommodation
can_perform_essential_functions_without_.description: Whether the individual can perform all essential functions without any accommodation. Drives preliminary_qualified_without_accommodation determination in Module 1 component 1.4.

meets_skill_experience_education_require.name: meets_skill_experience_education_requirements
meets_skill_experience_education_require.description: True if the individual meets the position's skill, experience, education, and other job-related requirements per 29 CFR § 1630.2(m).

module_2_accommodation_analysis.description: Inputs for Module 2: Accommodation Analysis. Covers accommodation request validation, undue hardship factors, and direct threat factors.

accommodation_type_requested.name: accommodation_type_requested
accommodation_type_requested.description: Category of accommodation requested. Use canonical vocabulary term.

accommodation_description.name: accommodation_description
accommodation_description.description: Freeform description of the specific accommodation requested.

accommodation_request_date.name: accommodation_request_date
accommodation_request_date.description: Date the accommodation was first requested or the employer first became aware of the need.

request_made_by.name: request_made_by
request_made_by.description: The party who made the accommodation request.

accommodation_is_for.name: accommodation_is_for
accommodation_is_for.description: Purpose for which the accommodation is requested.

functional_limitation_identified.name: functional_limitation_identified
functional_limitation_identified.description: True if the request identifies the functional limitation or workplace barrier the accommodation addresses.

accommodation_request_in_writing.name: accommodation_request_in_writing
accommodation_request_in_writing.description: True if the accommodation request was made or confirmed in writing. Not required by law but relevant to documentation.

accommodation_previously_denied.name: accommodation_previously_denied
accommodation_previously_denied.description: True if a substantially similar accommodation was previously denied by this employer.

accommodation_gross_cost.name: accommodation_gross_cost
accommodation_gross_cost.description: Total gross cost of the accommodation before any tax credits or outside funding. In USD.

tax_credits_available.name: tax_credits_available
tax_credits_available.description: Dollar value of available tax credits offsetting accommodation cost.

outside_funding_available.name: outside_funding_available
outside_funding_available.description: Dollar value of outside funding sources offsetting accommodation cost.

accommodation_net_cost.name: accommodation_net_cost
accommodation_net_cost.description: Net accommodation cost after credits and outside funding. If not provided, calculated by engine.

accommodation_frequency.name: accommodation_frequency
accommodation_frequency.description: Whether the accommodation cost is one-time, periodic, or recurring.

facility_annual_revenue.name: facility_annual_revenue
facility_annual_revenue.description: Annual revenue of the specific facility where the employee works. Used as cost burden denominator per 29 CFR § 1630.2(p)(2)(ii).

facility_employee_count.name: facility_employee_count
facility_employee_count.description: Number of employees at the specific facility.

facility_operating_budget.name: facility_operating_budget
facility_operating_budget.description: Annual operating budget of the specific facility. Preferred cost burden denominator when available.

entity_annual_revenue.name: entity_annual_revenue
entity_annual_revenue.description: Total annual revenue of the covered entity.

entity_total_employees.name: entity_total_employees
entity_total_employees.description: Total employees across all facilities of the covered entity.

entity_number_of_facilities.name: entity_number_of_facilities
entity_number_of_facilities.description: Total facilities operated by the covered entity.

administrative_relationship.name: administrative_relationship
administrative_relationship.description: Degree of administrative and fiscal integration between facility and parent entity.

geographic_separateness.name: geographic_separateness
geographic_separateness.description: True if the facility is geographically remote from other entity facilities.

impact_on_operations.name: impact_on_operations
impact_on_operations.description: Impact of the accommodation on the facility's ability to conduct business.

impact_on_other_employees.name: impact_on_other_employees
impact_on_other_employees.description: Impact of the accommodation on other employees' ability to perform their duties.

impact_description.name: impact_description
impact_description.description: Freeform description of the operational or employee impact.

direct_threat_basis.name: direct_threat_basis
direct_threat_basis.description: Whether employer asserts direct threat to the individual themselves, to others, or asserts no direct threat.

threat_duration.name: threat_duration
threat_duration.description: Duration of the asserted direct threat.

threat_severity.name: threat_severity
threat_severity.description: Employer's assessment of the severity of the direct threat.

threat_likelihood.name: threat_likelihood
threat_likelihood.description: Employer's assessment of the likelihood that the threatened harm will occur.

objective_evidence_basis.name: objective_evidence_basis
objective_evidence_basis.description: The evidentiary basis for the direct threat assessment. Current medical knowledge or objective evidence required under 29 CFR § 1630.2(r).

individualized_assessment_conducted.name: individualized_assessment_conducted
individualized_assessment_conducted.description: True if an individualized assessment of the individual's present ability was conducted, not reliance on generalizations.

mitigation_considered.name: mitigation_considered
mitigation_considered.description: True if the employer considered whether a reasonable accommodation could reduce the direct threat to an acceptable level.

module_3_employer_obligations.description: Inputs for Module 3: Employer Obligations. Covers interactive process quality, medical inquiry stage and basis, and confidentiality compliance.

interactive_process_initiated.name: interactive_process_initiated
interactive_process_initiated.description: True if the employer engaged in or initiated the interactive process after the accommodation request.

interactive_process_steps_completed.name: interactive_process_steps_completed
interactive_process_steps_completed.description: Steps of the interactive process completed by the employer.

employer_good_faith_shown.name: employer_good_faith_shown
employer_good_faith_shown.description: Whether the employer demonstrated good faith in exploring accommodation options.

process_breakdown_cause.name: process_breakdown_cause
process_breakdown_cause.description: The party responsible for any breakdown in the interactive process.

process_documented.name: process_documented
process_documented.description: True if the employer has contemporaneous documentation of the interactive process.

inquiry_stage.name: inquiry_stage
inquiry_stage.description: The stage of the hiring or employment relationship at which medical information was sought.

inquiry_type.name: inquiry_type
inquiry_type.description: The type of medical inquiry conducted.

inquiry_job_related.name: inquiry_job_related
inquiry_job_related.description: True if the inquiry is job-related and consistent with business necessity under 42 U.S.C. § 12112(d)(4)(A).

inquiry_consistent_with_business_necessi.name: inquiry_consistent_with_business_necessity
inquiry_consistent_with_business_necessi.description: True if the inquiry is consistent with business necessity as required for employment-stage inquiries.

medical_information_in_separate_file.name: medical_information_in_separate_file
medical_information_in_separate_file.description: True if medical information is maintained in a confidential file separate from the general personnel file, per 42 U.S.C. § 12112(d)(3)(B).

access_limited_to_authorized_personnel.name: access_limited_to_authorized_personnel
access_limited_to_authorized_personnel.description: True if access to confidential medical information is limited to authorized personnel only.

unauthorized_disclosure_occurred.name: unauthorized_disclosure_occurred
unauthorized_disclosure_occurred.description: True if the employer disclosed medical information to unauthorized parties.

module_4_violation_risk.description: Inputs for Module 4: Violation Risk. Covers interactive process participation quality, discrimination indicators, harassment facts, and retaliation proximity.

employee_interactive_process_participati.name: employee_interactive_process_participation
employee_interactive_process_participati.description: The quality of the employee's participation in the interactive process. 'refused' or 'abandoned' with documentation shifts FTA risk one tier downward.

employee_nonparticipation_documented.name: employee_nonparticipation_documented
employee_nonparticipation_documented.description: True if the employer has contemporaneous documentation of employee refusal or abandonment.

adverse_action_taken.name: adverse_action_taken
adverse_action_taken.description: True if the employer took an adverse employment action against the individual.

adverse_action_type.name: adverse_action_type
adverse_action_type.description: The category of adverse action taken.

adverse_action_reason_documented.name: adverse_action_reason_documented
adverse_action_reason_documented.description: The stated basis for the adverse action.

discriminatory_statements_made.name: discriminatory_statements_made
discriminatory_statements_made.description: True if supervisors or decision-makers made statements reflecting disability-based animus.

comparator_treated_differently.name: comparator_treated_differently
comparator_treated_differently.description: True if similarly situated non-disabled employees were treated more favorably under similar circumstances.

harassment_conduct_occurred.name: harassment_conduct_occurred
harassment_conduct_occurred.description: True if conduct occurred that may constitute disability-based harassment.

harassment_severity.name: harassment_severity
harassment_severity.description: The severity and pattern of alleged harassing conduct.

harassment_reported_to_employer.name: harassment_reported_to_employer
harassment_reported_to_employer.description: True if the harassment was reported through the employer's internal complaint process.

employer_remedial_action_taken.name: employer_remedial_action_taken
employer_remedial_action_taken.description: True if the employer took prompt and effective remedial action upon notice of the harassment.

engaged_in_protected_activity.name: engaged_in_protected_activity
engaged_in_protected_activity.description: True if the individual engaged in ADA-protected activity (accommodation request, complaint, opposition, participation in investigation).

employer_aware_of_activity.name: employer_aware_of_activity
employer_aware_of_activity.description: True if the employer had actual knowledge of the protected activity at the time of the adverse action.

causal_nexus_present.name: causal_nexus_present
causal_nexus_present.description: Whether circumstances suggest a retaliation nexus between the protected activity and the adverse action.

days_between_activity_and_action.name: days_between_activity_and_action
days_between_activity_and_action.description: Days between the protected activity and the adverse action. Drives proximity_strength calculation. If absent, defaults to not_provided.
